summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DOMMMA V3 AI Features: Smart Issue Reporter, Document Analyzer, Commute Optimizer, Resend Email integration, and updated dashboard sidebars. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested and working. All previously tested V2 features still functioning correctly.

minor.issue: In test mode - can only send to owner email (frontpointsolution@gmail.com). Expected behavior per Resend test mode limitations.

passed_tests: Backend: API root /api/ returns DOMMMA V2 message
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-issue returns analysis with issue_type, urgency, estimated_cost, matched_contractors
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-issue handles plumbing issues correctly
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-issue handles electrical issues correctly
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-issue handles empty description with fallback
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-document returns fairness_score, red_flags, green_flags, recommendations
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-document handles lease documents
Backend: POST /api/ai/analyze-document handles rental agreements
Backend: POST /api/ai/commute-search returns ranked_properties with commute scores
Backend: POST /api/ai/commute-search handles single work address
Backend: POST /api/ai/commute-search handles multiple work addresses
Backend: POST /api/ai/commute-search handles driving transport mode
Backend: Registration triggers welcome email (Resend test mode)
Backend: GET /api/listings returns properties (regression)
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search returns contractors (regression)
Backend: Login with existing credentials works
Frontend: Homepage loads with Hero and Nova search bar
Frontend: Homepage AI Tools section shows 3 cards (Smart Issue Reporter, Lease Analyzer, Commute Optimizer)
Frontend: Homepage Contractor Services section shows 6 categories (Plumbing, Electrical, Painting, Renovation, Landscaping, Cleaning)
Frontend: /report-issue page loads with upload area and description input
Frontend: /report-issue AI analysis returns issue_type=Plumbing, HIGH urgency, estimated cost $150-$500
Frontend: /report-issue shows matched contractors (5) with Book Now buttons
Frontend: /document-analyzer page loads with text input and document type selector
Frontend: /document-analyzer returns fairness score 4/10, red flags, green flags, recommendations
Frontend: /commute-optimizer page loads with work address inputs and transport mode selector
Frontend: /commute-optimizer returns 20 properties ranked by commute with scores
Frontend: Renter dashboard sidebar shows Report Issue, Lease Analyzer, Commute Search links
Frontend: Landlord dashboard sidebar shows My Properties and Report Issue links
Frontend: /contractors page shows 10 contractor cards with filters
Frontend: /browse page shows 23 listings with Apply Now and Message buttons in modal
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing: 7+ contractors, 18+ services, 23+ listings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3 AI features verified and working: 1) Smart Issue Reporter at /report-issue - AI analyzes issues, matches contractors with Book Now flow. 2) Document Analyzer at /document-analyzer - AI returns fairness score, red/green flags, recommendations. 3) Commute Optimizer at /commute-optimizer - AI ranks properties by commute time. 4) Resend email integration working (test mode - only sends to owner email). 5) Dashboard sidebars updated with AI tool links for renters (Report Issue, Lease Analyzer, Commute Search) and landlords (Report Issue). All V2 features still working: contractor marketplace, browse page with Apply Now, landlord properties, etc.

Smart Issue Reporter (/report-issue).details: Upload area, description input, AI analysis returns HIGH urgency for plumbing issues, estimated cost $150-$500, 5 matched contractors with Book Now buttons

Document Analyzer (/document-analyzer).details: Text input area, document type selector (lease/rental agreement/contract), AI returns fairness score (4/10 for test lease), 7 key terms, 6 red flags, 4 green flags, recommendations

Commute Optimizer (/commute-optimizer).details: Work address inputs (up to 3), max commute slider (45m), transport mode selector (transit/driving/cycling), AI returns 20+ properties ranked by commute with scores and tips

Homepage AI Tools Section.details: 3 cards: Smart Issue Reporter, Lease Analyzer, Commute Optimizer with links to respective pages

Homepage Contractor Services Section.details: 6 categories: Plumbing, Electrical, Painting, Renovation, Landscaping, Cleaning with links to /contractors

Renter Dashboard Sidebar.details: Shows Report Issue, Lease Analyzer, Commute Search links along with existing navigation

Landlord Dashboard Sidebar.details: Shows My Properties and Report Issue links

Resend Email Integration.details: Welcome emails triggered on registration. Resend is in test mode - only sends to owner email (frontpointsolution@gmail.com). No server errors.

API Endpoints.details: /api/ai/analyze-issue, /api/ai/analyze-document, /api/ai/commute-search - all returning expected AI-powered responses via Claude Sonnet 4.5

notes.AI_Response_Times: AI endpoints take 5-30 seconds to respond as they call Claude Sonnet 4.5. This is expected behavior.
notes.Resend_Test_Mode: Email integration is configured correctly but Resend is in test mode. To send to other recipients, domain verification at resend.com/domains is required.
notes.Existing_Features: All V2 features (contractor marketplace, browse page, landlord properties, applications) continue to work correctly.
